instruction_blocks.preamble_append: You are operating in READ-ONLY mode. You may observe, analyze, and report, but you MUST NOT make any changes.
constraint_additions: ABSOLUTELY NO write operations of any kind
DO NOT execute commands that modify state
ONLY use read-only commands: ls, cat, ps, top, df, grep, find, dig, ping
IF a write operation is needed, document the recommended action for later execution
REPORT findings without taking corrective action

communication_style_overrides.tone: Observational. Report findings objectively. Recommend but do not act.

meta.description: Read-only scope for observation and analysis without modification capability.
